modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty adding speed dials to Cisco VoIP phone.

full_description_text: 
The user was attempting to set up speed dials on their Cisco Voice over Internet Protocol phone, specifically the model 8851. They were looking for guidance on how to add these speed dial numbers to the PUBLIC AREA VoIP phones, which also require an outgoing call code. The user mentioned needing a hot button on the phone for easier access, but they were unsure of the steps involved in this process. This has caused some confusion and frustration during the call, as they were not able to complete the setup as intended.
